data.title: Cognizant Propels AI Workforce Training with Cognizant Skillspring™: New Talent Transformation Platform Designed to Accelerate Clients' Workforce AI Readiness
data.description: A cutting-edge platform has been introduced to aid organizations in attaining proficiency in artificial intelligence (AI). This platform is designed to ensure that employees are equipped with the necessary skills to meet the requirements of an economy driven by AI. Known as Skillspring, this innovative tool utilizes Cognizant's extensive experience in providing workforce training. By aligning workforce capabilities with the demands of AI, Skillspring enables outcome-based learning tailored to meet specific business goals.

data.title: New Alzheimer's Association Report: Americans Care Deeply About Brain Health but Most Don't Know How to Maintain It
data.description: The importance of maintaining brain health as people age is recognized by nearly 88% of U.S. adults, with 99% considering it as crucial as physical health. However, only a small 9% feel well-informed about brain health maintenance. Consequently, the number of individuals coping with clinical issues related to brain health is rising...

data.title: The Ad Council Elects 22 Members to Its Board of Directors
data.description: On April 21, 2026, in New York, the Ad Council, a nonprofit organization known for driving social change through effective communication programs, appointed 22 new members to its Board of Directors during the biannual meeting. Rita, the chairperson, led the proceedings.

data.title: Toby Neugebauer Incredibly Bullish on Project Matador and Calls for Sale of Company to Maximize Shareholder Value
data.description: Toby Neugebauer commends his team for developing the country's most appealing power asset. Neugebauer, along with his close family members and past executives, collectively control around 40% of Fermi shares. Notably, Neugebauer has not divested a single share since the initial public offering, displaying a strong alignment with fellow shareholders. Demonstrating dedication to shareholders, Neugebauer has expressed a commitment to aiding in the process of organizing a sale for the company.

data.title: Rio Tinto donates A$1.5 million to support Qld and NT communities impacted by Severe Tropical Cyclone Narelle and recent widespread flooding
data.description: In Melbourne, Australia, Rio Tinto has announced a donation of A$1.5 million to aid disaster relief in Queensland and the Northern Territory after they were hit by Severe Tropical Cyclone Narelle and flooding. The donation will support immediate relief efforts and enhance preparedness for future emergencies. A$1 million will go towards assisting Queensland, with the Australian Red Cross and State Emergency Service benefiting from the funds to bolster response and preparedness measures.

data.title: CrowdStrike Accelerates SMB Cybersecurity Transformation Across JAPAC with Expanded Distributor-Led Services
data.description: In Texas and Vietnam, CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) has revealed plans to broaden its Managed Security Service Provider (MSSP) approach in Japan and Asia Pacific (JAPAC). This move aims to enhance SMBs' reach to the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform and speed up AI-powered cybersecurity evolution. In collaboration with Dicker Data and Otsuka Corporation, key distributors, CrowdStrike is set to bolster its strategic partnerships as part of this expansion strategy.
